partitionType.Description: Visually partition wheel sections by relative weight, or equal size for each item regardless of weight

playTickSound.Name: playTickSound
playTickSound.Description: Play a tick sound while the wheel is spinning?

tickSound.Name: tickSound
tickSound.Description: Sound to play as a tick while the wheel spins

showSpinsOwed.Name: showSpinsOwed
showSpinsOwed.Description: Enable to show count of spins remaining

autoShowHide.Name: autoShowHide
autoShowHide.Description: Hide the wheel while idle. It pops in when a spin starts and pops away after the result

resultDisplaySeconds.Name: resultDisplaySeconds
resultDisplaySeconds.Description: How many seconds the result popup stays visible before hiding

CdnFonts.description: Additional cdn fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.

BunnyFonts.description: Additional bunny fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.
